design.composable: useForceLayout(payload, completed, options) -> { nodes, links, start, stop, reheat }
design.simulation_lifecycle: owned by composable; rebuilds on payload/completed/options change; ticks reassign nodes ref to drive Vue reactivity

dumb_component_compliance.DagTopology_vue: props in (nodes, links, width, height, groupBy, zoom, pan); events out (select, hover, update:groupBy, reheat, zoom); zero fetch/async/setTimeout/imperative DOM in <script setup>; only computed projection of link endpoints to render coords
dumb_component_compliance.intelligence_location: useForceLayout.ts composable owns all state and simulation

notes: Composable + dumb component pair. Force-directed with two grouping modes (depth/cluster) replacing static dagre-only layout. Pan/zoom state delegated to caller (props in).
